prompt: a space scene with asteroids positioned as in the reference binary mask.
prompt_refined: Generate a photorealistic space scene featuring five distinct asteroids. Position these asteroids precisely according to the white shapes in the provided binary mask (image 1): two larger, irregularly shaped asteroids in the upper-left and upper-right areas, and three smaller, more circular asteroids centrally below them. Ensure no asteroids appear in the lower half of the image.
objects: two large, irregularly shaped asteroids in the upper-left
two large, irregularly shaped asteroids in the upper-right
three smaller, more circular asteroids centrally below the larger ones
no asteroids in the lower half of the image
